preferred_translation: quenching of the six fields of experience
definition: A dependent-origination link named on the side of cessation and quenching.
notes: Use this record when the reverse dependent-arising link is named compactly as salayatana-nirodha rather than quoted as the fuller reverse-line sentence. Keep the family aligned with the repository's quenching default for nirodha and prefer fuller reverse-sequence wording when the canonical sentence itself is present.
literal_meaning: quenching of the six fields of experience

example_phrases.translation: with the quenching of the six fields of experience, the quenching of contact

translation_policy.default_scope: Use for the compact named salayatana-nirodha link inside the reverse dependent-arising family; prefer fuller reverse-line wording when the canonical sentence is present.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not flatten nirodha into generic cessation language or treat this short compound record as the preferred target when a fuller reverse-line rendering already fits the passage.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the reverse link from drifting away from the repository's quenching default.
